headline: Arca Continental Drives Growth as It Celebrates Its 100th Anniversary
summary: MONTERREY, Mexico, March 24, 2026--Arca Continental, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: AC) ("Arca Continental" or "the Company"), one of the most important Coca-Cola bottlers in the world, continues to advance its growth strategy as it celebrates 100 years as the first Coca-Cola bottler in Mexico. The company announced that in 2026 it will invest approximately Ps. 18.5 billion across its operations.

headline: Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages and Texas Monthly Studio Reveal Winners of Star-Spangled Texas Mural Competition
summary: DALLAS, March 24, 2026--Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages (CCSWB) has confirmed Abilene, Bryan and Tyler as the winning cities of the Star-Spangled Texas mural competition.
